title: Why the price new of my product is wrong?
bodyHtml:
During the product creation process, all mandatory fields must be filled in, so that your listings can be pushed to validation.

This rule does also occur for the price of the new product and must be filled in by you, when creating your product. 

 

⚠️ If this field isn't correctly filled in, the price new of your product will be incorrect and may block your listing's validation or publication. It is very important to fill in this value correctly. 

 

In order to indicate a correct and coherent price new, we suggest you to use the official prices displayed by the brand of the product in question.
